title: AFL-CIO urged to commit $100 million annually to organize Amazon workers as AI surveillance expands
description: Amazon uses AI to monitor, discipline, and fire 1.5 million workers across its logistics network. The model is spreading to other industries, creating legal and ethical risks HR leaders should prepare for.

title: Amazon, Alphabet, and Microsoft Are All Racing to Design Their Own AI Chips. Here's What It Means for Nvidia.
description: The cloud giants are spending hundreds of billions to build AI data centers -- and a growing slice of that money is going toward chips they design themselves.

title: AI Boom Faces Hard Infrastructure Reality
description: The AI market, currently valued at US$20 trillion ($28.4 trillion), draws parallels to the late 1990s dotcom bubble. While technological revolutions drive progress, current speculative momentum concerns veteran investors. This time, a fundamental physical constraint threatens to significantly impede the The post AI Boom Faces Hard Infrastructure Reality first appeared on Sharecafe .

title: AI vaccine shows modest effect
SEGA's 'Crazy Taxi: World Tour' to Bring Franchise Back to Consoles, Uses Generative AI
description: The upcoming 'Crazy Taxi: World Tour' will be the first main series entry in years and is set to release in 2027. However, its use of generative AI in creating in-game assets has sparked controversy among fans.
